profile.name: Patricio Nicolas Massaro Rocca
profile.summary: Holding a Masters degree in Data Science from LMU Munich, complemented by a background in electronic engineering, I bring years of experience in designing and implementing end-to-end machine learning pipelines aligned to business needs. I am eager to leverage my expertise in a role that challenges me to contribute to solutions and products that would improve peoples lives.

accomplishments: Founder of the Data Science & Machine Learning department in Windifferent, the company's B2B marketing growth acceleration service.
Trained data-driven prospect segmentation and rating models for a hundred clients, leading to double the conversion rates of the campaigns by performing 300M predictions per day.
Designed and implemented automatic inbound interactions classification models using NLP, decreasing the human workload by 37%.
Conducted Data Analysis to help top management in their strategic decision-making process.
Trained deep learning models to perform super-resolution adapted to the company remote sensing data products, used in wildfire and irrigation management, and urban heat studies.
Trained deep convolutional model for fine-scale georeferencing of thermal data products.
Defined cloud architecture and implemented BI Tools.
Created platform adoption KPIs and implemented action plans for their improvement.

experiences.company_name: Laser, Optics of Materials and Electromagnetic Applications Laboratory, Engineering Faculty, University of Buenos Aires
accomplishments: Published two papers about the Effects of broadband piezoelectric devices in optoacoustic image reconstruction.

education.thesis_title: Blind Super Resolution Applied to Thermal Remote Sensing Data Products
Effects of broadband piezoelectric devices in optoacoustic image reconstruction
